content.problemStatement:
Given a positive integer NNN, construct two arrays AAA and BBB, each of size NNN such that:


Aiв‰ AjA_i \ne A_jAiвЂ‹оЂ =AjвЂ‹ for all (1в‰¤i<jв‰¤N)(1\le i \lt j \le N)(1в‰¤i<jв‰¤N);
Biв‰ BjB_i \ne B_jBiвЂ‹оЂ =BjвЂ‹ for all (1в‰¤i<jв‰¤N)(1\le i \lt j \le N)(1в‰¤i<jв‰¤N);
Aiв‰ BjA_i \ne B_jAiвЂ‹оЂ =BjвЂ‹ for all (1в‰¤i,jв‰¤N)(1\le i,j \le N)(1в‰¤i,jв‰¤N);
1в‰¤Ai,Biв‰¤3в‹…1051 \leq A_i, B_i \leq 3\cdot 10^51в‰¤AiвЂ‹,BiвЂ‹в‰¤3в‹…105 for all (1в‰¤iв‰¤N)(1\leq i \leq N)(1в‰¤iв‰¤N);
вЉ•A[1,i]=вЉ•B[1,i]\oplus A[1,i] = \oplus B[1,i]вЉ•A[1,i]=вЉ•B[1,i] for all (1в‰¤iв‰¤N)(1\le i \le N)(1в‰¤iв‰¤N) such that iii is **even**.
Here вЉ•A[L,R]\oplus A[L,R]вЉ•A[L,R] corresponds to the bitwise XOR of all elements of the subarray [L,R][L,R][L,R] of array AAA. Similarly, вЉ•B[L,R]\oplus B[L,R]вЉ•B[L,R] corresponds to the bitwise XOR of all elements of the subarray [L,R][L,R][L,R] of array BBB.

If multiple answers are possible, ouput any.


Input Format

First line will contain TTT, the number of test cases. Then the test cases follow.
Each test case contains of a single line of input, a single integer NNN - as mentioned in statement.


Output Format
For each test case, output two lines.



The first line contains NNN space-separated integers denoting the elements of the array AAA.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers denoting the elements of the array BBB.

If multiple answers are possible, ouput any.
constraints: Sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 2182^{18}218.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: A possible pair of arrays is A=[6,3]A = [6, 3]A=[6,3] and B=[11,14]B = [11, 14]B=[11,14].

The only even value of iв‰¤2i\le2iв‰¤2 is 222. Thus, вЉ•A[1,i]=вЉ•A[1,2]=A1вЉ•A2=6вЉ•3=5\oplus A[1,i] = \oplus A[1,2] = A_1 \oplus A_2 = 6 \oplus 3 = 5вЉ•A[1,i]=вЉ•A[1,2]=A1вЂ‹вЉ•A2вЂ‹=6вЉ•3=5. Also, вЉ•B[1,i]=вЉ•B[1,2]=B1вЉ•B2=11вЉ•14=5\oplus B[1,i] = \oplus B[1, 2] = B_1 \oplus B_2 = 11 \oplus 14 = 5вЉ•B[1,i]=вЉ•B[1,2]=B1вЂ‹вЉ•B2вЂ‹=11вЉ•14=5.

Test case 222: A possible pair of arrays is A=[100000,98630,300000]A = [100000, 98630, 300000]A=[100000,98630,300000] and B=[200000,199334,299999]B = [200000, 199334, 299999]B=[200000,199334,299999].

The only even value of iв‰¤3i\le 3iв‰¤3 is 222. Thus, вЉ•A[1,i]=вЉ•A[1,2]=A1вЉ•A2=100000вЉ•98630=2022\oplus A[1,i] = \oplus A[1,2] = A_1 \oplus A_2 = 100000 \oplus 98630 = 2022вЉ•A[1,i]=вЉ•A[1,2]=A1вЂ‹вЉ•A2вЂ‹=100000вЉ•98630=2022. Also, вЉ•B[1,i]=вЉ•B[1,2]=B1вЉ•B2=200000вЉ•199334=2022\oplus B[1,i] = \oplus B[1, 2] = B_1 \oplus B_2 = 200000 \oplus 199334 = 2022вЉ•B[1,i]=вЉ•B[1,2]=B1вЂ‹вЉ•B2вЂ‹=200000вЉ•199334=2022.

Test case 333: A possible pair of arrays is A=[4,1,9,5]A = [4, 1, 9, 5]A=[4,1,9,5] and B=[7,2,10,6]B =[7, 2, 10, 6]B=[7,2,10,6].

The even values of iв‰¤4i\le 4iв‰¤4 are 222 and 444.

i=2:i = 2:i=2: вЉ•A[1,i]=вЉ•A[1,2]=A1вЉ•A2=4вЉ•1=5\oplus A[1,i] = \oplus A[1,2] = A_1 \oplus A_2 = 4 \oplus 1 = 5вЉ•A[1,i]=вЉ•A[1,2]=A1вЂ‹вЉ•A2вЂ‹=4вЉ•1=5. Also, вЉ•B[1,i]=вЉ•B[1,2]=B1вЉ•B2=7вЉ•2=5\oplus B[1,i] = \oplus B[1,2] = B_1 \oplus B_2 = 7 \oplus 2 = 5вЉ•B[1,i]=вЉ•B[1,2]=B1вЂ‹вЉ•B2вЂ‹=7вЉ•2=5.
i=4:i = 4:i=4: вЉ•A[1,i]=вЉ•A[1,4]=A1вЉ•A2вЉ•A3вЉ•A4=4вЉ•1вЉ•9вЉ•5=9\oplus A[1,i] = \oplus A[1,4] = A_1 \oplus A_2 \oplus A_3 \oplus A_4 = 4 \oplus 1 \oplus 9 \oplus 5 = 9вЉ•A[1,i]=вЉ•A[1,4]=A1вЂ‹вЉ•A2вЂ‹вЉ•A3вЂ‹вЉ•A4вЂ‹=4вЉ•1вЉ•9вЉ•5=9. Also, вЉ•B[1,i]=вЉ•B[1,4]=B1вЉ•B2вЉ•B3вЉ•B4=7вЉ•2вЉ•10вЉ•6=9\oplus B[1,i] = \oplus B[1, 4] = B_1 \oplus B_2 \oplus B_3 \oplus B_4 = 7 \oplus 2 \oplus 10 \oplus 6 = 9вЉ•B[1,i]=вЉ•B[1,4]=B1вЂ‹вЉ•B2вЂ‹вЉ•B3вЂ‹вЉ•B4вЂ‹=7вЉ•2вЉ•10вЉ•6=9.
